Device spec written to <ARTIFACT_DIR>/device-sniff-ble-sample/device.yaml (1 command, 1 telemetry field)
BLE analysis written to <ARTIFACT_DIR>/device-sniff-ble-sample/analysis.json
Archived evidence written to <ARTIFACT_DIR>/device-sniff-ble-sample/evidence.json (device addresses pseudonymized, supplied name terms redacted; captured values preserved)
